name: Nut or Almond Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the pastry to a rectangle measuring 14" x 18" (35 cm x 45 cm).
2. For the filling: Mix the nuts, sugar, baking essence, egg white, and 1/2 egg yolk with enough water to achieve a good spreading consistency. Spread evenly over the pastry using a spatula.
3. Starting from the longer side, roll up the pastry like a Swiss roll. Form the roll into a ring and place it on a greased baking sheet.
4. Brush the roll with beaten egg yolk mixed with 1 tbsp milk.
5. Make regular cuts in the surface, approximately 1/4" (1/2 cm) deep.
6. Oven: Moderately hot
Baking Time: About 20 minutes
